room.caption: [G6-WindG] I had a lot of fun and learned a lot developing the game. My sprite-ripping days are over, but game development is not.

stringToShow="It is advised to not drunkenly push the block into the wind stream while it is blowing down... much like meisnewbie has done." signSize=3
